description: Files that must NEVER be captured in a snapshot, even with --include-auth. Matched on basename, case-insensitively. Three pattern kinds: 'extensions' (the file's extension), 'exactNames' (the whole basename), 'globNames' (a basename glob, '*' = any run; every entry MUST contain a '*'). See the plan's Security section (harness-mgr-v5.md). Editing this list is the supported, transparent way to extend secret coverage (threat-model H2).
